case_title: LA, CARLOS vs. MCKENZIE, MARK et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATOR'S AWARD SENT TO DEFAULT SECTION

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LA, CARLOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCKENZIE, MARK $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF
